description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine swsmod_status_2, and is implemented by a call to swsmod_status_2. Use this API to change the status of the switched shunt model at a specified switched shunt device. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = swsmod_status(ibus, status)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Switched shunt bus number. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: no model at this switched shunt device.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
